title: Report
description: Final cited research report from the synthesize node. markdown carries inline [source_id] citations; citations is the resolved reference list. Matches the inlined S.report table in workflow.js.

markdown.description: Full report body in Markdown. Every factual sentence carries an inline [source_id] citation.

citations.description: Resolved references; each source_id should match a findings source.id used in the markdown.

source_id.description: The findings source.id this citation resolves.
